idempotency_policy: Stripe event id is stored as payment_event:{stripe_event_id}; already processed events return success without duplicate writes.
access_grant_policy: Durable paid access is created only from verified Stripe webhook events and is source-labeled paid_stripe.
subscription_state_policy: Subscription state is compact and updated from subscription Checkout, invoice.paid, and customer.subscription lifecycle events.
revenue_index_policy: V0 indexes payment event ids by month only; no revenue totals are exposed.
production_setup_steps: Subscribe to checkout.session.completed, invoice.paid, customer.subscription.created, customer.subscription.updated, customer.subscription.deleted.
Add STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET directly to Vercel Production without pasting it into chat.
Redeploy production if Vercel requires env redeploy.
production_smoke_plan: access-status unknown identifier returns access_found false
optional Stripe Dashboard test event verifies signed route after STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET is configured
controlled real payment only with explicit approval
verified payment creates payment_event and access_grant
monthly subscription creates or updates subscription_state
access-status returns active grant after webhook confirmation
success page shows verified only after grant exists
limits: No real payment has been completed.
No fake payment events are created.
No durable access is granted from redirect success.
No raw Stripe payloads are stored.
No broad revenue totals are exposed.
